# My Quiet Space

> A private space to feel, write, and heal — mood check-in, journaling, calm tools, healing paths, and a gentle AI reflection companion. Not therapy or emergency support.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Pause, write, and feel a little clearer.
- [Healing paths](/heal): Short structured paths for heartbreak, overthinking, comparison, night calm, and loneliness.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/login): Account access.
